# System: "I found several British food restaurants in Cambridge city centre within the moderate price range: 1. Restaurant One Seven at De Vere University Arms Regent Street, 2. The Oak Bistro at 6 Lensfield Road, 3. The Copper Kettle at 4 Kings Parade, and 4. Cotto at 183 East Road. Would you like to book a table at any of these? If so, please tell me which one."
